title: GateLM AI Safety Lab Safety Detection
description: Sanitized Lab/eval detection result. This schema intentionally excludes raw detected values, raw prompt fragments, raw offsets, and raw spans.

detectorType.description: GateLM-normalized detector category label. The schema keeps this open by pattern rather than closing detector types as an enum.

source.description: Sanitized detector or adapter source label.

mode.description: Whether this detection affected enforcement or was collected as shadow evidence.

confidence.description: Lab/eval-only model confidence. Gateway/API/UI summaries should not expose this by default.

modelVersion.description: Sanitized model or detector version label. This must not contain raw prompt or detected content.

modelLabel.description: Raw model taxonomy label such as private_email or ORG-B. This is a sanitized label, not a detected value.
